allow:
Bash(for dir in ~/projects/ghost ~/projects/biography ~/projects/ai-networking-system ~/projects/audio-intelligence-pipeline ~/projects/project-init-skill; do
  echo "=== $\(basename $dir\) ==="
  git -C "$dir" log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null || echo "\(not a git repo or no commits\)"
  echo ""
done)

Bash(for dir in ~/projects/ghost ~/projects/biography ~/projects/ai-networking-system ~/projects/audio-intelligence-pipeline ~/projects/project-init-skill; do
  echo "=== $\(basename $dir\) ==="
  git -C "$dir" status --short 2>/dev/null || echo "\(not a git repo\)"
  git -C "$dir" log --oneline --merges -5 2>/dev/null | grep -q "Merge" && echo "Has merge commits" || true
  echo ""
done)
Bash(gh repo view getnao/nao --json name,description 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(gh api 'repos/getnao/nao/git/trees/main' --jq '.tree[] | select\(.path | startswith\("cli"\)\) | .path' 2>&1 && gh api 'repos/getnao/nao/contents/cli/nao_core' --jq '.[].path' 2>&1)

Bash(gh api 'repos/getnao/nao/contents/apps/backend/src/services/test-agent.service.ts' --jq '.content' | base64 -d 2>&1 && echo "---" && gh api 'repos/getnao/nao/contents/apps/backend/src/services/agent.ts' --jq '.content' | base64 -d 2>&1)

docs: add Rule/Guideline/Note type tags to all global lessons

Introduced a 3-tier type system \(Rule/Guideline/Note\) to all global
lesson files and the LESSONS template. Updated format spec and promotion
rule in LESSONS_GLOBAL.md. Graded all ~25 existing entries across
LESSONS_N8N.md, LESSONS_CLAUDE.md, LESSONS_ARCHITECTURE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
